# Solar Project Quick Handoff (2026-07-13)

- Session checkpoint: stale session closed with explicit blocker-first restart plan.
- Source of truth: `HANDOFF.md` and `SOLAR_HANDOFF_2026-07-13.md`.
- Active repo: `Solar-Project-200w`.

What is done:
- DEC-005 is closed: STM32G431 is the Rev 0 controller baseline.
- Requirements validation notes and pre-routing blocker list were created.
- Rev 0 component shortlist was created for the currently drawn blocks.

Open state:
- Local schematic and docs are modified but not committed.
- KiCad autosave file is present and should not be committed.

Next session first move:
1. Read `HANDOFF.md` and `SOLAR_HANDOFF_2026-07-13.md`.
2. Run `git status --short`.
3. Fix current-sense net collisions and fault-net ownership in `Solar Project.kicad_sch`.
4. Re-run ERC and update `hardware/mppt/schematic-notes.md`.

Paste prompt:
Continue from `SOLAR_HANDOFF_2026-07-13.md` in Solar-Project-200w. Start by clearing pre-routing blockers in `hardware/kicad/solar-project/Solar Project.kicad_sch` (`SENSE_PV_I`, `SENSE_BAT_I`, `FAULT_OCP`, `FAULT_OVP`), then run ERC and record results in `hardware/mppt/schematic-notes.md`. Keep docs and schematic commits separate and exclude KiCad autosave files.
